problem.title: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number
problem.description: Given a string containing digits from 2-9 inclusive, return all possible letter combinations that the number could represent.
assumptions: Return empty list if input is empty.

example.explanation: 2→abc, 3→def. All combinations of one letter from each digit group.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Backtracking [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Use backtracking to explore every possible letter choice for each digit in sequence. At each recursive step, one digit is consumed and every letter mapped to it is tried, growing the current combination string. When all digits have been consumed the complete combination is added to the result, giving O(4^n) total combinations in the worst case.
